Need some advice first?

Here are some of the most common questions we hear in the workshop. Straight answers, no scare tactics.

Quick Answer

My warning light is on.

Some lights mean stop immediately. Others mean get it checked soon.

Read more →
Quick Answer

What oil should I put in my car?

The correct oil depends on your vehicle. Don’t guess.

Read more →
Quick Answer

How much air goes in my tyres?

Check the sticker inside the driver’s door, not the tyre sidewall.

Read more →
Quick Answer

My key won’t turn.

Don’t force it. There are a few simple things you can safely check first.

Read more →

What we look after

Four simple pillars covering the work we do every day at J.R Automotive.

Keeping Your Vehicle Reliable

Routine servicing, maintenance and preventative care.

Finding & Fixing Problems

Diagnostics, repairs, auto electrical and fault finding.

WOF Inspections

In-house WOF inspections for cars, trailers and LAMS-approved motorcycles.

Modern to Classic

Hybrid & EV servicing, air conditioning, carburettors and older vehicles.

The J.R Difference

Honest Advice

We’ll explain what’s happening in plain English so you can make the right decision.

Do It Once, Do It Right

Quality workmanship, attention to detail and repairs we’re proud to stand behind.

You’ll Speak Directly With Me

When you call J.R Automotive, you’ll speak directly with Jase.

Here To Help

We’d rather help you understand your vehicle than leave you worrying or guessing.

Meet Jase

J.R Automotive is proudly Napier owned and operated. The goal is simple: clear advice, quality workmanship and making vehicle ownership less stressful.

Cars are what we work on, but people always come first.
